title: The Create Addon
description: A Modpack around the Create mod. The Create Mod is a thechnical mod with kenetic Energie (su) and shafts, cogwehls to connect different components like a crushing wheels with su.
body:
This Create-Modpack is a variation of Create-Mods that I put together for people to play with.

In this Modpack are the Mods: EMF for entety models (needed for Fresh-Animations), ETF (needed for Fresh-Animations), AmbientSounds 6 for a nicer feeling at night and in specific biomes, AppleSkin for ceeping track of your saturation, Create Deco is for more Industrial looking blocks, Create: Copycats+ for more Copycats; if you don't know what copycats are: they come in different form and you can apply textures of other Blocks by simply right-klicking then the block in your Hand get's used, Create: Dreams & Desires for some more Create themed Weapons and Tools, Create: Numismatics is for a currency, Create: Steam 'n' Rails for a better variation of the Create rails (used for Trains), Freecam, Gamma Utils for permenant nightvision, Indium for optemization, Iris & Oculus Flywheel Compat for optemization, Iris Shaders for Shaders, Jade the Block that your looking at get's shown at the top ofb your screen, Jade Addons for the Stats of the block that your looking at, JEI is for a better view of all the items and they're Crafting-Recipies, Netherracked for a possible infinite netherack source, Simple Voice Chat to talk with other people, Sodium for optemization, Tom's Simple Storage Mod for more variations of storage, Traveler's Backpack is for Backpacks, Xaero's Minimap for a Minimap, Xaero's World Map for a Worldmap and last the Create mod it's self.

Create:                                                                                                                                                                          

The added elements of tech are designed to leave as many design choices to the player as possible. With Create, the game isn't played inside a bunch of UIs, it challenges you to setup contraptions of animated components working together in many possible arrangements.

Create's visual in-game documentation called 'Ponder' will guide you though all added mechanics and gadgets.
